text.title: Writing Specifications Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding Writing Specifications. Each pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale; HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override.

rule.statement: spec.md is the single written source of truth for WHAT and WHY; anything not in spec.md is out of scope.
rule.rationale: spec.md is the single written source of truth for WHAT and WHY; anything not in spec.md is out of scope.

rule.statement: spec.md must not contain implementation choices (frameworks, file structure, API shapes); those live in design.md.
rule.rationale: spec.md must not contain implementation choices (frameworks, file structure, API shapes); those live in design.md.

rule.statement: Every functional requirement is SMART (Specific, Measurable, Achievable, Relevant, Time-bound) and carries a stable FR-X id.
rule.rationale: Every functional requirement is SMART (Specific, Measurable, Achievable, Relevant, Time-bound) and carries a stable FR-X id.

rule.statement: Every requirement has at least one Given-When-Then acceptance criterion with concrete values, not vague descriptors.
rule.rationale: Every requirement has at least one Given-When-Then acceptance criterion with concrete values, not vague descriptors.

rule.statement: spec.md must include an explicit 'Out of scope' list; absence of an item from in-scope is not enough.
rule.rationale: spec.md must include an explicit 'Out of scope' list; absence of an item from in-scope is not enough.

rule.statement: If preconditions in AGENTS.md "Applies If" do not all hold, OR any "Skip If" disqualifier is true, do not run this methodology — route to the named alternative.
rule.rationale: Methodologies are pre-condition gated; running them out-of-scope produces noise and burns the agent context budget.

rule.statement: If preconditions hold, execute the procedure in `content/04-procedure.xml` (or the rule set above when complexity is light), emit the artefact specified by `content/02-output-contract.xml`, and validate with `scripts/validate-writing-specifications.py` before returning.
rule.rationale: Tying the entry rule to the validator script closes the loop between policy and machine check.
